config.mDescription: Throws a magic bolt of ethereal energy that follows enemies.
config.mQDescription: a magic bolt that follows enemies

raw_values.mDescription: "Throws a magic bolt of ethereal energy that follows enemies."

config.mDescription: Create faster and more accurate bolts.  Bolts will chase a new target if their current target is destroyed.

config.mDescription: Throws more magic missiles in a single cast.

config.mDescription: Magic missiles pierce through objects and enemies.

config.mDescription: Hurls a ball of fire at enemies.

raw_values.mDescription: "Hurls a ball of fire at enemies."

config.mDescription: Explosions emit embers on impact.

raw_values.mDescription: "Explosions emit embers on impact."

config.mDescription: Imps emerge from spent embers to chase down enemies.

raw_values.mDescription: "Throws an electric arc at enemies."

config.mDescription: Causes lightning to arc to more enemies.

config.mDescription: Lightning bolts hold enemies, slowing and stopping them.

config.mDescription: Calls stones from the earth and binds them into a gigantic, destructive boulder.

raw_values.mDescription: "Calls stones from the earth and binds them into a gigantic, destructive boulder."
